comment: Shared typed-control wire fixture. envelopeHex is a SETPOINT frame (intent only) produced by the REAL browser chain (keyboard w through the compiled wasm runtime, scaled by the advertised 3.0/1.5/0.9 velocity envelope, encoded by wire.js); actionCommandHex is the RELIABLE-stream ControlActionCommand (Arm, nonzero id, full authority binding) for the same session — discrete actions never ride datagrams (CTRL-01). clients/web/typed-command.test.mjs proves the browser produces exactly these bytes; crates/pilotage-session/tests/typed_wire_e2e.rs decodes the SAME bytes and drives them through the session engine to the adapter boundary.
